title: Aureline message catalog entry record
description: Boundary schema for the message_catalog_entry_record frozen in docs/ux/localization_and_locale_pack_contract.md. Every translatable string the shell, command palette, settings, help, error pane, docs pack, tour, auth flow, extension overlay, CLI surface, exporter, screenshot/demo caption pipeline, glossary surface, or trust/legal/recovery banner reads resolves through one record of this shape. The contract mints no new command_id, command_revision, docs_citation_anchor, glossary_term_anchor, deployment_profile_id, redaction_class, freshness_class, version_match_state, or BCP-47 vocabulary; those are re-exported by reference from schemas/commands/command_registry_entry.schema.json, schemas/commands/command_descriptor.schema.json, schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json, artifacts/governance/deployment_profiles.yaml, and schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json. Adding a new message_surface_family, message_id_class, placeholder_kind, translator_note_class, machine_output_locale_class, string_freeze_state, source_language_escape_hatch_class, or denial_reason is additive-minor and bumps message_catalog_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw page bodies, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw credential material, raw prompt / completion text, and raw user identifiers never cross this boundary; this schema carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, short privacy-safe labels, and typed policy / redaction metadata only.

message_catalog_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this localization / message-catalog vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version. The same version integer gates schemas/ux/locale_pack_manifest.schema.json and schemas/ux/locale_fallback_state.schema.json so the three schemas evolve lock-step.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries this kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / support bundles / portable profile packages. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw page bodies, raw credential material, and raw prompt text never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

short_label_text.description: Short privacy-safe label text. MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, or raw AI prompt / completion text.

source_language_text.description: Source-language wording for translator review and pseudoloc seed. NOT a runtime rendering source; the runtime resolves a translation by message_id, not by matching this text. MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, or raw AI prompt / completion text. Long-form prose (multi-paragraph docs body, full policy disclosure) is owned by the docs / policy pack body and is not carried inline here.

bcp47_locale_tag.description: BCP-47 language tag re-exported from schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json without modification.

placeholder_kind.description: Closed placeholder-kind vocabulary. See §3.2. Translators MAY reorder placeholders to honour locale syntax; they MUST NOT paraphrase or silently normalize a placeholder whose kind is anything other than freeform_string.

machine_output_locale_class.description: Closed machine-output locale class vocabulary. See §4. locale_neutral_canonical values MUST NOT be translated in machine output.

source_language_escape_hatch_class.description: Closed source-language escape-hatch class vocabulary. See §7.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason set publishers MUST emit on non-conformance. See §9.

policy_context.description: Policy context this catalog entry was minted under. Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification.

placeholder_id.description: Stable placeholder id (lowercase, snake_case). The id, not the source-language order, is what translators reorder around.

translator_note_text.description: Optional translator-facing note explaining the placeholder's literal-spelling requirement, plural-rule resolution, or controlled-vocabulary source.

glossary_term_ref.description: Optional opaque pin to a glossary_term_anchor record on schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json that translators MUST consult. Required when placeholder_kind = enumerated_state_token AND the controlled vocabulary is owned by the docs glossary.

plural_rule_resolution_ref.description: Opaque ref to the plural-rule resolution row this count placeholder uses. Required when placeholder_kind = count.

allOf.description: count placeholders MUST declare a plural-rule resolution.

decision_row_ref.description: Optional opaque pin to the decision row that authorised the note (controlled-delta review row, screenshot governance row, late-copy review row). Required when note_class = string_freeze_late_copy_review or screenshot_or_demo_caption_governance.

allOf.description: Late-copy and screenshot/demo governance notes MUST cite a decision row.

message_id.description: Opaque, stable message id (e.g. msg.shell.start_center.open_folder.label). Frozen on first publication; rename = breaking.

source_language_locale.description: BCP-47 tag for the source language this entry was authored in (typically en or en-US for the project).

source_text.description: Source-language wording for translator review. The runtime resolves a translation by message_id, not by matching this string.

placeholders.description: Typed placeholders the translator may reorder. Empty for messages with no substitutions.

glossary_term_refs.description: Opaque ids resolving to glossary_term_anchor records on schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json. Required (minItems 1) when surface_family = glossary_or_terminology_term.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque pin to a canonical command_id on schemas/commands/command_registry_entry.schema.json. Required (non-null) when surface_family = command_label.

extension_namespace_ref.description: Opaque pin to the extension namespace this overlay belongs to. Required when surface_family = extension_contributed_ui or message_id_class = extension_overlay.

source_language_escape_hatches.description: Admissible escape-hatch routes this surface offers. Required (minItems 1) for surface families {docs_tour_or_auth_text, policy_legal_or_recovery_text, cli_help_text, export_or_report_heading, glossary_or_terminology_term}.

upstream_message_id_refs.description: Upstream message ids this entry derives from. Required (minItems 1) for message_id_class = derived_with_upstream_id; forbidden (maxItems 0) otherwise.

deprecation_alias_for_message_id_ref.description: Opaque pin to the prior message_id this entry replaces during a controlled rename rollout. Catalogs MAY emit both ids during the deprecation window.

denial_reason_on_deny.description: Reserved for catalog rows minted to record a denial event (e.g. a colliding id detected during ingest). Null on conformant rows.

allOf.description: command_label rows MUST carry a non-null command_id_ref.
extension_contributed_ui rows MUST carry a non-null extension_namespace_ref.
extension_overlay message_id_class MUST carry a non-null extension_namespace_ref.
glossary_or_terminology_term rows MUST carry at least one glossary_term_ref.
policy_legal_or_recovery_text rows MUST carry policy_or_legal_review_required = true and a frozen state.
docs_tour_or_auth_text rows MUST list at least one in-product or pane-route escape hatch.
cli_help_text rows MUST list cli_locale_neutral_output_flag among their escape hatches.
export_or_report_heading rows MUST list export_in_source_language_for_review among their escape hatches.
pseudoloc_only_test_string rows MUST be class pseudoloc_test_only and pseudoloc_required = true.
pseudoloc_test_only message_id_class is admissible only on the pseudoloc_only_test_string surface family.
derived_with_upstream_id rows MUST carry a non-empty upstream_message_id_refs; all other classes require it empty.
late_copy_controlled_delta MUST carry at least one string_freeze_late_copy_review translator note.

Forbidden machine-output values forbid placeholders typed as locale-neutral tokens from being marked as freeform_string. (Schema-level guard against silently flattening canonical tokens; consumer-side checks finish the validation.)
